description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine:latest Docker image and a before_script that logs in to the GitLab Container Registry with docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY. Define variables IMAGE_TAG1 as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME and IMAGE_TAG2 as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA, and three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs docker build -t $IMAGE_TAG1 ., then docker tag $IMAGE_TAG1 $IMAGE_TAG2, and pushes both images with docker push $IMAGE_TAG1 and docker push $IMAGE_TAG2, and is tagged with the docker runner tag. In the test stage add two jobs, test1 and test2, each running echo "test1" and echo "test2" respectively, both also using the docker tag. No artifacts, caches, or conditional rules are defined.
